mapper.sql: id, task_name, description, initiator_id, initiator_name, current_stage, deadline, completion_status, priority, remark, deleted, published_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_task WHERE initiator_id = #{initiatorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY published_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_task WHERE completion_status = #{completionStatus} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY published_time DESC

SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_task ut WHERE ut.task_id = t.id AND ut.deleted = 0) as assignee_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_task ut WHERE ut.task_id = t.id AND ut.deleted = 0 AND ut.completion_status = 'completed') as completed_count FROM t_task t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.published_time DESC
